午.mnemonics: Visualize 'go' as the sun ('go') shining brightly at noon.

後.mnemonics: Think of 'ato' as the footsteps ('ato') left behind after someone ('ushi') has passed by.

前.mnemonics: Remember 'mae' as looking ahead ('mae') into the past ('zen').

名.mnemonics: Visualize 'na' as a person ('na') writing their name ('mei') with a bright light ('myou').

白.mnemonics: Think of 'shiro' as a white ('shiro') sheet of paper ('haku').

雨.mnemonics: Remember 'ame' as raindrops ('ame') falling from the sky ('u').

書.mnemonics: Visualize 'ka' as writing a letter ('ka') in a book ('sho').

友.mnemonics: Think of 'tomo' as a friend ('tomo') saying 'you' ('yuu') are their best friend.

間.mnemonics: Remember 'aida' as the space ('aida') between two buildings ('kan') in a city ('gen').

家.mnemonics: Visualize 'ie' as a house ('ie') with a big yard ('ya') and a gate ('ka').

話.mnemonics: Think of 'hana' as speaking ('hana') about a story ('hanashi') with a friend ('wa').

少.mnemonics: Remember 'suko' as having a little ('suko') scoop ('suku') of ice cream.

古.mnemonics: Visualize 'furu' as an old ('furu') tree trunk ('ko') covered in moss.

知.mnemonics: Think of 'shi' as knowing ('shi') the answer to a question ('chi').

来.mnemonics: Remember 'kuru' as someone coming ('kuru') to visit ('rai') your home ('ko').
